about.label: About Us
about.heroTitle:
Heritage Flavors,
Now at Your Home
about.heroDesc: Dapur Dekaka (德卡) is a premium Chinese-Indonesian frozen food producer from Bandung, bringing down family recipes with MUI halal standards to all of Indonesia.
about.storyP1: Starting from a small kitchen in Turangga, Bandung, Dapur Dekaka was born from a dream to bring authentic Chinese-Indonesian flavors to every Indonesian household.
about.storyP2: With decades of experience crafting quality frozen food, we present products like dimsum, siomay, bakso, and lumpia made from selected ingredients and hygienic production processes.
about.storyP3: Every Dapur Dekaka product is equipped with MUI halal certification, so you don't have to worry about the halal status of our products. We believe quality and religious beliefs are not a choice — they are the standard.
about.qualityDesc: We only use high-quality ingredients, carefully selected by our experts to ensure perfect taste and texture.
about.halalDesc: All products are MUI halal certified. Halal is not just a label, it is our promise to every customer.
about.coldChainDesc: From our kitchen to your doorstep, our cold chain is strictly maintained to ensure the freshness and quality of our products.
about.productionDesc: All Dapur Dekaka products are produced at our facility at Jl. Sinom V No. 7, Turangga, Bandung. Bandung was chosen not without reason — the city is known as the best Chinese-Indonesian culinary center in Indonesia, and we are proud to be part of that culinary tradition.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to taste our premium frozen food?
about.ctaDesc: Order now and enjoy free shipping on your first purchase. Shipped across Indonesia with maintained cold chain.

policy.privacyLastUpdated: Last updated: May 2026 — In accordance with Law No. 27 of 2022 on Personal Data Protection (UU PDP)
policy.dataCollectedDesc: Dapur Dekaka collects the following personal data to process orders and provide the best service:
policy.dataItemAddressDesc: to ship products to your location
policy.dataItemPaymentDesc: processed by Midtrans, not stored on our servers
policy.dataItemHistoryDesc: for customer service and loyalty points
policy.purposeItem1: Processing and shipping frozen food orders
policy.purposeItem2: Sending order status notifications via WhatsApp and email
policy.purposeItem3: Providing loyalty points and personal promotions
policy.purposeItem4: Fulfilling legal obligations and tax regulations (VAT)
policy.protectionItem1: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmission
policy.protectionItem2: Secure storage in Neon PostgreSQL database
policy.protectionItem3: Limited access only for authorized staff
policy.protectionItem4: Not selling or sharing data to third parties for marketing purposes
policy.retentionDesc: Personal data is stored as long as the account is active and as long as needed for legal purposes. You can request data deletion at any time — all personal data will be anonymized or deleted from the system, except data that must be stored for legal/tax purposes (invoices, transaction records for a minimum of 10 years).
policy.rightsItem3: Request deletion of data under certain conditions
policy.rightsItem6: File a complaint with the data protection authority
policy.cookiesDesc: The dapurdekaka.com website uses cookies for:
policy.cookiesFuncDesc: remembering cart items and language preferences
policy.cookiesAnalyticsDesc: understanding how visitors use the site
policy.cookiesDisable: You can disable cookies through your browser settings.
policy.whatsappBusinessDesc: When you contact us via WhatsApp, chats are recorded on WhatsApp Business for customer service purposes. Conversation data is handled according to WhatsApp Business privacy policy. We do not use WhatsApp data for marketing purposes.
policy.changesDesc: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be announced through the website and/or email. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the latest policy.
policy.contactDesc: For questions about privacy policy or to request data deletion, contact:
policy.contactAddress: Or send mail to: Jl. Sinom V No. 7, Turangga, Bandung 40261, Indonesia
policy.noRefundDesc: Given the nature of our products as frozen food, all Dapur Dekaka products cannot be returned after receipt. This is in accordance with Indonesian food safety regulations that do not allow frozen food that has left the cold chain to be returned to trade.
policy.claimableDesc: We accept claims under the following conditions:
policy.claimableItem1: Product received is wrong or not as ordered
policy.claimableItem2: Packaging is damaged or not airtight causing the product to thaw
policy.claimableItem3: Product received is incomplete from what was ordered
policy.claimablePhoto: Photo evidence is required when claiming: outer packaging photo, product photo, and shipping label photo.
policy.howToClaimStep1: Contact us via WhatsApp within 24 hours after product is received
policy.howToClaimStep2: Attach the necessary photos (packaging, product, shipping label)
policy.howToClaimStep3: Our team will verify within 1x24 business hours
policy.howToClaimStep4: If the claim is approved, refund or reshipping will be processed
policy.refundTimelineDesc: After the claim is approved, refund will be processed within 1-7 business days to the sender's account or through the original payment method. If payment is made via Midtrans (credit card, VA, etc.), refund will be credited according to Midtrans policy (3-14 business days).
policy.wrongAddressTitle: Product Not Received Due to Wrong Address
policy.wrongAddressDesc: If the package is returned because the recipient's address is invalid or unreachable, we will contact you for re-confirmation. Second shipping costs are borne by the buyer.

promise.title: Our Customer Promise
promise.subtitle: What Dapur Dekaka promises — and what it doesn't. We believe over-promising hurts customers more than under-promising.
promise.disclaimer: This charter is the single source of truth for all customer-facing shipping, SLA, and trust copy.

wePromise.1: All products are halal and made in our Bandung facility — the same product as in our offline store and Shopee.
wePromise.2: Every order is packed frozen with ice gel and insulated packaging, photographed before dispatch.
wePromise.3: Pickup orders are ready during operating hours; your pickup code is your order number.
wePromise.4: Kilat (Bandung): packed and picked up by the courier the same day when paid before the cut-off (visible at checkout).
wePromise.5: Frozen Same-Day (Paxel/AnterAja): handed to the cold-chain courier same day or next day before the cut-off.
wePromise.6: Frozen Express (intercity): dispatched by next day at the latest, with packing rated for 1–2 day travel.
wePromise.7: Tracking number and link are sent via WhatsApp and email as soon as the courier is booked.
wePromise.8: If your order arrives damaged or thawed due to our shipping failure, we replace or refund in full — no debate.
wePromise.9: All payments are processed by Midtrans; we never ask for manual transfers outside the system.
wePromise.10: WhatsApp questions are answered within operating hours, by the next business day at the latest.
wePromise.11: Our website price is always below Shopee for the same product.
wePromise.12: Cancellations before dispatch = full refund (processed within 1–7 business days).

weDoNotPromise.1: Specific arrival times — only courier-provided estimates.
weDoNotPromise.2: Products arriving "still frozen" via motorcycle couriers (Kilat) — we guarantee the packing method, not the arrival temperature.
weDoNotPromise.3: Free shipping or marketplace-style shipping subsidies.
weDoNotPromise.4: Shipping rates that match public courier lists — our rate covers frozen handling on top.
weDoNotPromise.5: Shipping to destinations outside our coverage area (hard block, not "try anyway").
weDoNotPromise.6: Same-day delivery on public holidays or outside operating hours.
weDoNotPromise.8: Compensation for courier-only delays (we escalate; refund decisions are case-by-case).
weDoNotPromise.9: Address changes after the courier has been booked.
weDoNotPromise.10: Permanent stock availability — real-time stock can sell out.
weDoNotPromise.12: Website price matching the offline store (offline stays cheapest — by design).

spoilage.title: My dimsum arrived melted or spoiled
spoilage.stance: Refund-first. Ask for photos — don't argue about temperature. Replace or refund in full within 24 hours plus a personal WhatsApp from the owner. Log into the refund ledger. This is not a cost — it's brand insurance.

ongkir.title: Why is shipping more expensive than Shopee?
ongkir.stance: Our shipping includes frozen handling (ice gel + insulation) and only uses couriers proven safe for frozen. Total product + shipping is still below Shopee.

lost.title: Package hasn't arrived, no tracking movement
lost.stance: We escalate with the courier the same day; daily WhatsApp updates. If lost: refund or resend, and we handle the courier claim — never push it onto the customer.

wrongItem.title: Wrong item / shortage
wrongItem.stance: Photos → send replacement or refund the difference, same day. No interrogation under Rp 50k value.

negotiate.title: Can you negotiate / match offline price?
negotiate.stance: Offline pricing is in-store only. The website is the cheapest channel for delivered orders. Loyalty points exist for repeat customers. Hold the price ladder — it protects all channels.

sla.pickup: Ready for pickup today during opening hours after payment is confirmed.
sla.kilat: Arrives 1–3 hours after courier pickup (Bandung area). Packed in cooler bag + ice gel; motorcycle courier has no active cooling — please store in freezer immediately.
sla.frozenSameDay: Arrives today or tomorrow via cold-chain courier (Paxel/AnterAja). Estimated by courier.
sla.frozenExpress: Arrives within 1–2 days via intercity frozen service. Packed for up to 48 hours of transit.

tierTruth.express: Motorcycle courier has no active cooling. We guarantee the packing method (cooler bag + ice gel), not the arrival temperature.
tierTruth.frozenExpress: Fast intercity (1–2 days). Packing rated for 48 hours — pre-tested before Phase 2.
tierTruth.pickup: Customer-owned from handover. Pick up at the store after payment is confirmed.

opsCard.title: Dapur Dekaka Daily Ops Card
opsCard.subtitle: 15 minutes, at 08:30. Tick each item as you finish it.
opsCard.line1: Check Vercel logs for Midtrans webhook errors in the last 24 hours.
opsCard.line2: Orders stuck in pending_payment > 1 hour? → check Midtrans dashboard.
opsCard.line3: Paid orders not yet in the packing queue?
opsCard.line4: Failed or retrying dispatches? → run the Failed-Booking SOP.
opsCard.line5: Biteship wallet balance ≥ 2× last 7-day shipping cost? Monday: TOP UP.
opsCard.line6: Is the Fonnte device online? Send a test to your own number (every Monday).
opsCard.line7: Reply to all WhatsApp messages from overnight.
opsCard.line8: Kilat: paid-by-14:00 orders must be booked before 16:00.
opsCard.line9: Refund ledger: any obligations > 3 days old? Process now.
opsCard.line10: Physical vs system stock: random spot-check 2 SKUs.
opsCard.weeklyHint: Monday ritual: top up wallet, check cron logs, refund ledger review.
